articles.title: US launches new strikes on Iran after Trump vows to 'hit them hard'

articles.title: Essex Police given new information on West Ham co-owner David Sullivan

articles.title: Fireworks illuminate Barcelona's Sagrada Família during Pope visit

articles.title: Mike Ashley's Frasers offers £1.73bn to buy all of Hugo Boss
articles.description: The retail group already owns just over a quarter of the German fashion brand but wants to buy the rest of it.
